articles.title: HSBC wins Bank of England approval to enter Digital Securities Sandbox
articles.description: The Bank of England approved HSBC Orion to go live in its Digital Securities Sandbox, with the first Digital Gilt Instrument transaction expected in the first quarter of 2027.

articles.title: Pat Gelsinger 持續示警晶片對台灣依賴風險，還指英特爾該讓有技術背景者領導
articles.description: 英特爾（Intel）前執行長Pat Gelsinger近期對全球過度依賴台灣晶片供應提出嚴厲警告。他表示，在中 […]

articles.title: SBI acquires Singaporean crypto platform Coinhako after MAS approval
articles.description: SBI Holdings received regulatory approval to acquire a majority stake in Singapore-based crypto exchange Coinhako as it expands into stablecoins, onchain finance and tokenized assets.

articles.title: The British Virgin Islands are a top crypto hub no one ever talks about: Here’s why
articles.description: Kraken, Bitstamp, 1inch and Bitfinex have all set up shop in the British Virgin Islands — but you might find it tricky to book an on-site meeting with one of their executives.

articles.title: Bitcoin faces fresh headwinds as China’s Kimi beats Claude, GPT in coding benchmark
articles.description: Moonshot's Kimi K3 took the top spot in frontend coding away from Claude and OpenAI, and it's free. Semiconductor stocks fell, and crypto fell with them.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Dutch court declares crypto platform Knaken bankrupt over missing funds
articles.description: The Rotterdam court said bankruptcy was necessary to ensure an orderly settlement because the company lacked enough assets to fully repay users.

articles.title: Stablecoin growth will erode bank deposits, says ECB’s Cipollone
articles.description: ECB’s Piero Cipollone said stablecoin adoption could erode bank deposits, but the digital euro will keep banks at the center of payments.

articles.title: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
articles.description: A $400 million chip-backed loan points to the next wave of AI infrastructure deals.

articles.title: AI frenzy losing steam leaves bitcoin less volatile than South Korean stocks
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 17, 2026

articles.title: UK sentences 2 hackers tied to $115M crypto ransom scheme
articles.description: The pair pleaded guilty after investigators linked them to the Scattered Spider cybercrime group, which US prosecutors say extorted dozens of companies.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin slips below $63,000 as the chip rout goes global
articles.description: A deepening global selloff in chipmakers dragged risk assets lower, pulling bitcoin back from the $65,000 level it reached on this week's soft inflation print.

articles.title: ESMA adds 14 new CASPs to MiCA register as licensing slows
articles.description: ESMA adds 14 CASPs to its MiCA register, with banks and Ripple Payments Europe among the new entries as total providers reach 294.

articles.title: Risk-off wave drags bitcoin below $63,000 as AI selloff spreads from stocks to crypto
articles.description: Crypto fell as AI stock fatigue and U.S.-Iran tensions weighed on sentiment, though a technical measure hints at oversold conditions heading into the weekend.

articles.title: Bitcoin bottom countdown nears 50 days after BTC supply in loss passed 50%
articles.description: Bitcoin supply in loss hit 50% nearly 50 days ago, mimicking the countdown to BTC price bear-market bottoms.

articles.title: 旺矽重訊宣布勝訴，稱穎崴控違反公平交易法求償 500 萬遭駁回

articles.title: 從概念發想到後期製作，Netflix 揭 300 部作品採生成式 AI

articles.title: 不只台灣，亞洲股市受半導體類股拖累指數倒一片

articles.title: US indicts crypto investor over alleged $20M fraud scheme
articles.description: Federal prosecutors allege the South Dakota investor used false promises to raise money, repaid earlier investors with new funds and laundered proceeds through crypto exchanges.
